the_trap: An ActiveMQ broker process (java) spawns cmd->certutil->payload as Administrator; the payload executes, connects to 10.0.2.13:4444, and spawns a child shell before AnyDesk is downloaded. Sysmon supplies commands, network, and process ids while Security 4688 independently corroborates the tree and identity — a confirmed critical foothold.
rationale: java (ActiveMQ) spawns cmd (A0), certutil downloads a payload (EV-003/004), and the payload executes (EV-006) and connects to 10.0.2.13:4444 (EV-007). Security 4688 then records that payload spawning cmd as Administrator (EV-008), while Sysmon records the matching high-integrity cmd process and parent pid (EV-009). Security and Sysmon subsequently record the AnyDesk download (EV-010..012). The cross-sensor chain confirms an RCE foothold without relying on the port number alone to assert a reverse shell.
